title: Wire local-client injected locations into unified provider
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2 acceptance requires app/local-client injected locations to use the same firmware-wide location representation as hardware, network, and manual sources. The core HAL provider API exists, but no native local-client or compatibility app path submits location samples yet. What needs to be done: identify the LCI/Meshtastic/app location injection entry points, translate incoming location/fix metadata into lichen_hal_location_sample with source_class LOCAL_CLIENT, enforce freshness/accuracy/source-name policy, and add native_sim/qemu tests. Acceptance criteria: a no-hardware test injects a local-client/app location and observes it through lichen_hal_location_time_snapshot_get(); invalid partial fixes and stale client locations behave consistently with the core provider; two code-review passes are completed.
notes: Implementation commit d0232fa5 pushed. Scope completed for shared no-hardware local-client/app ingress: added lichen_app_interface_submit_location(), app-interface/HAL bridge submission, local-client source/fix validation, HAL coordinate bounds, saturating/pre-boot observed-uptime freshness handling, and app_interface/HAL ztests. Follow-up endpoint work filed and parent-blocking: project-LICHEN-zte2.6 native LCI CoAP location endpoint; project-LICHEN-zte2.7 Meshtastic POSITION_APP decoding. Review evidence: initial Archimedes/Noether/Confucius findings fixed (submit API wiring, reject fix_source instead of drop, saturating age math, deterministic test clock, invalid enum rejection, E7 coordinate bounds, invalid updates preserve prior sample). Revised Averroes review: no P0/P1/P2. Revised Bohr review: only remaining P2 is endpoint wiring, covered by project-LICHEN-zte2.6/.7. Revised Faraday review: no code P0/P1; parent dependency for zte2.7 added. Test evidence: focused EC2 Twister passed: west twister -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/hal -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-local-client-location-v1 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen; result 5/6 configs passed, 1 static skip, 83 cases, 23 skipped, 0 failures/errors/warnings, 97.45s. Broad EC2 Twister from pushed commit d0232fa5 passed: west twister -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/hal -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/puck_location -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-local-client-location-consumers-v1 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen; result 10/12 configs passed, 2 static skips, 121 cases, 45 skipped, 0 failures/errors/warnings, 205.78s.
close_reason: Completed shared no-hardware app/local-client location submit path; endpoint-specific LCI/Meshtastic wiring captured in blocking follow-up Beads.
